use_cases: Collecting user feedback with real-time character validation
Product review text submission with minimum length requirements
Support ticket description with inline validation messages
Comment or review sections with live validation feedback
Survey response text fields with validation indicators
ai_summary: A feedback textarea component with real-time validation that displays error messages when input is below a minimum character threshold and success feedback when valid. Features accessible aria-invalid attributes and role alerts for screen readers. Built with shadcn/ui primitives for seamless integration into form-heavy applications.
